emails.subject: LRCI, Inc. problem
emails.body: LRCI, Inc. problem Dear Gerald: I've received a notice re LRCI, Inc. Crawfish plant. We're delinquent on our "Form R6" and a penalty has been levied ($250.00). I think this is the sort of regulatory matter that used to be handled by Juanita Marchant, who has moved to AEP. Do you know who is in charge of handling these kinds of filings? Thanks, Mary Mary C. Ogden Legal Specialist Enron Wholesale Services/Enron Americas/Legal Phone: 713-853-7796 Fax: 713-646-3490 Mary.Ogden@enron.com

emails.subject: RE: LRCI, Inc. problem
emails.body: RE: LRCI, Inc. problem Mary, Is this an operational type filing or an entity type filing? If it is operational, then it is probably someone else's issue. To: Nemec, Gerald

emails.subject: RE: LRCI, Inc. problem
emails.body: RE: LRCI, Inc. problem Gerald: I think it is an operational problem, because I don't even know what an R6 report is. I just don't know who handles those filings for LRCI, Inc.--do you? I could call Juanita Marchand at AEP and ask her who took her place, but I didn't want to call over there if it wasn't necessary.
